\tzpentry{ID4201}{Rho Dark Apparent Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4201 introduces Rho Dark Apparent Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \rho_{\text{dark}}^{\text{apparent}} = \frac{c^2}{4\pi GR_U^2} \Delta_{S^3}\Phi_{\text{dark}} \end{equation}
